archetype.name: Lion Blade
archetype.note: This archetype offers Focused Fascination at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Focused Fascination
feat.text: When you use Fascinating Performance in a combat encounter, you need only a success, rather than a critical success, to fascinate your target. This works only if you're attempting to fascinate one target. For example, if you were an expert in Performance, you could choose to target multiple creatures normally or target one creature and fascinate it on a success.

traits.name: Swashbuckler
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the swashbuckler class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
